title: Cobblemon Interface [Refined Storage]
description: Refined Storage GUI in Cobblemon Interface style.
body:
This resource pack changes the default interface of the [Refined Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage) mod, giving it style and atmosphere [Cobblemon Interface](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface).

Now working with storage systems will become more harmonious and visually coherent, whether you use Cobblemon or just like its interface.

🎨 All original ideas and visual style of Cobblemon Interface belong to [VinnyStalck](https://modrinth.com/user/VinnyStalck).

🔧 Mod Refined Storage created by [Refined Mods](https://modrinth.com/organization/refinedmods).

### Supported Addons
- [ExtraStorage](https://modrinth.com/mod/extrastorage/versions)
- [Cable Tiers](https://modrinth.com/mod/cable-tiers)

### Important

Support for this resource pack will cease if [Cobblemon Interface Modded](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface-modded) starts supporting the Refined Storage mod.
